Package org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.registry

Class TacticUIInfo

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.registry.AbstractInfo
org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.registry.AbstractUIInfo
org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.registry.TacticUIInfo
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProofCommandInfo, TacticProviderInfo
public abstract class TacticUIInfo extends AbstractUIInfo

    TacticUIInfo.Target
    Enumeration internalizing the target attribute of UI tactics.

  • Constructor Details

    • TacticUIInfo

      public TacticUIInfo(String id, TacticUIInfo.Target target, org.eclipse.jface.resource.ImageDescriptor iconDesc, boolean interrupt, String tooltip, int priority, String name, String dropdown, String toolbar, boolean skipPostTactic)
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the tactic
      target - the target of the tactic
      iconDesc - the descriptor of the icon of the tactic, or null
      interrupt - true if the tactic is interruptible, false otherwise
      tooltip - the tooltip of the tactic
      priority - the priority used in menus to sort tactics
      name - the name o the tactic
      dropdown - the id of the dropdown menu that displays the tactic, if any; null if the tactic is local
      toolbar - the id of the toolbar that displays the tactic, if any; null if the tactic is local
      skipPostTactic - true to skip post tactic application, false otherwise

  • Method Details

    • getTarget

      public TacticUIInfo.Target getTarget()
      Returns the target application of the tactic.
      Returns:
      a target

    • getTooltip

      public String getTooltip()
      Returns the tooltip associated to the tactic.
      Returns:
      a tooltip

    • getDropdown

      public String getDropdown()
      Returns the id of the dropdown menu through which the tactic is available.

      In particular, local tactics are never displayed in dropdown menus.

      Returns:
      a dropdown id, or null if the tactic is not in a dropdown menu

    • isInterruptable

      public boolean isInterruptable()
      Returns whether the tactic is interruptible or not.
      Returns:
      true if interruptible, false otherwise

    • getToolbar

      public String getToolbar()
      Returns the id of the toolbar through which the tactic is available.

      In particular, local tactics are never displayed in toolbars.

      Returns:
      a toolbar id, or null if the tactic is not in a toolbar

    • isSkipPostTactic

      public boolean isSkipPostTactic()
      Returns whether to skips post tactic after tactic application.
      Returns:
      true to skip post tactic, false otherwise

    • getGlobalApplication

      public abstract Object getGlobalApplication(IUserSupport us, String globalInput)
      Returns a global tactic application if applicable, or null.
      Parameters:
      us - the User Support, see IUserSupport
      globalInput - the global tactic input
      Returns:
      a ITacticApplication or ICommandApplication if applicable, else null
